signInPrompt.title: Sign in to see your dial
signInPrompt.description: Log in with your Atmosphere account to save favorites and add your own stations.

empty.favoritesSelf: Tap the heart on any station to save it here.
empty.favoritesOther: This user hasn't favorited any stations.
empty.recentSelf: Stations you play will show up here.
empty.recentOther: This user hasn't played any stations yet.
empty.stationsSelf: Add a stream that isn't listed with its name and URL.
empty.stationsOther: This user hasn't added any stations.
empty.noMatchesDescription: Nothing matches your search or filters.
